data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Shares Opinion on Iran Conflict
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump recently shared an opinion piece by Christopher Ruddy on social media, asserting that he had already won the conflict with Iran. According to NS3.AI, Ruddy outlined eight reasons supporting this claim, highlighting achievements such as halting Iran's nuclear weapons development and dismantling its nuclear program. Additionally, Ruddy argued that the conflict had weakened Iran and its proxy network, potentially facilitating the reopening of Gulf energy flows.

data.title: Barclays Revises ECB Rate Hike Forecast for 2026
data.description: Barclays has updated its forecast for the European Central Bank's (ECB) interest rate hikes in 2026. According to Jin10, the bank now anticipates that the ECB will raise rates by 25 basis points in both June and September. This is a shift from its previous prediction, which expected rate hikes in April and June.

data.title: X's Cashtags Feature Generates $1 Billion in Trading Volume
data.description: X has reported generating approximately $1 billion in trading volume within two days following the launch of its Cashtags feature on Tuesday night. According to NS3.AI, X's head of product, Nikita Bier, stated that Cashtags allow users to link a specific asset or smart contract address to a ticker. When tapped, this feature opens a live price chart and related posts. Currently, the feature is available only to iPhone users in the United States and Canada, with Wealthsimple being the sole brokerage integration announced so far. Bier emphasized that X will not conduct trades directly but aims to offer financial data tools and routing links.

data.title: Worldcoin's WLD Drops 13.4% Amid New Identity Verification Integrations
data.description:
Worldcoin's WLD token experienced a significant decline of 13.4%, reaching approximately $0.28 on Friday. According to NS3.AI, this drop occurred as Worldcoin announced new identity-verification integrations with platforms such as Zoom, Docusign, and Tinder. In contrast, the broader cryptocurrency market saw a rise of 2.2% on the same day, highlighting the notable decrease in WLD's value.

Zoom intends to implement World's Deep Face authentication technology to combat deepfake threats, enhancing security measures. Meanwhile, Docusign and Tinder are incorporating Worldcoin's verification system into their signature and user workflows, aiming to improve identity verification processes.

data.title: The SOL spot ETF saw net inflows of $35.17 million last week.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the SOL spot ETF saw a net inflow of $35.17 million last week (April 13th to April 17th, Eastern Time). The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow last week was the Bitwise ETF BSOL, with a weekly net inflow of $29.6332 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $819 million. The second largest was the Fidelity ETF FSOL, with a weekly net inflow of $4.6252 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $155 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of the SOL spot ETF was $903 million, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total SOL market capitalization) of 1.76%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.01 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw net inflows of $276 million last week, with Fidelity's FETH ETF leading the way with $126 million in net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a net inflow of $276 million last week (April 13th to April 17th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a weekly net inflow of $126 million, bringing FETH's historical total net inflow to $2.36 billion. This was followed by the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a weekly net inflow of $99.2271 million, bringing ETHA's historical total net inflow to $11.83 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow last week was the Grayscale Ethereum Trust (ETHE), with a weekly net outflow of $16.679 million, bringing ETHE's historical total net outflow to $5.2 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is $14.26 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) is 4.87%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $11.94 billion.

data.title: LayerZero's "strategic partner" wallet distributed 1.21 million ZRO tokens, of which 855,000 were transferred to Binance.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, LayerZero's strategic partner wallet (0x637...F7BF) distributed 1.21 million ZRO tokens, worth $1.97 million, to 52 addresses half an hour ago. The largest single transaction, 855,000 ZRO tokens worth $1.42 million, has been transferred to Binance. ZRO's price fell 18% yesterday due to the rsETH vulnerability incident.

data.title: BitMart contracts will list ABTUSDT, PEPONUSDT, and MAONUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch perpetual contracts for ABTUSDT, PEPONUSDT, and MAONUSDT on April 20, 2026 at 16:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage up to 50x.

data.title: Trump retweeted an article claiming victory in the Iran war, listing eight major achievements.
data.description: US President Trump recently retweeted a commentary by conservative political figure Christopher Ruddy on social media. In the article, Ruddy argues that Trump has won the war, and won decisively. The article provides eight reasons for this "win": ① It achieved its goal of preventing Iran from developing nuclear weapons and destroying its nuclear program. ② It undermined Iran's status as a regional military power. ③ It fostered a de facto new Arab-Israeli alliance, as key Gulf states found their future closely tied to Washington and Jerusalem. ④ It weakened the network of Iranian proxies that had plagued the region for years. ⑤ It forced NATO members to rethink and strengthen NATO. ⑥ Russia's position has also been weakened. While Moscow may benefit in the short term from sanctions relief and high oil prices, these are only temporary gains. ⑦ Stabilizing the Gulf region and reopening energy flows will ultimately benefit global markets and the world economy. ⑧ The conflict with Iran may make the US stronger and better prepared for future wars.

data.title: Relay Infrastructure Unaffected by rsETH Incident, Operations Continue
data.description: Relay, an interoperability infrastructure, announced via Twitter that its core products remain unaffected by the rsETH incident, ensuring all routes continue to operate normally. According to Foresight News, Relay is currently unable to process vault withdrawals as the collateral has been deposited into the Aave WETH market to generate returns. If Aave does not update promptly, the team will initiate a process to assist users with manual withdrawals.

data.title: DeFiLlama Co-Founder Analyzes Post-Hack Scenarios for Kelp DAO's rsETH
data.description: DeFiLlama co-founder 0xngmi has outlined three potential scenarios following the hack affecting Kelp DAO's rsETH. According to NS3.AI, one scenario suggests that Aave could face approximately $216 million in bad debt after an 18.5% haircut. Another option, which leaves rsETH holders on Layer 2 solutions uncompensated, could result in about $341 million of bad debt on Aave. A third approach, involving a pre-hack snapshot, would still result in around $91 million in losses even after Umbrella coverage.

data.title: Whale Withdraws Significant Assets Amid Bridge Vulnerability
data.description: A major OTC whale has withdrawn substantial assets from Aave, according to Odaily. The whale, identified by the address 0xd45...FB20, extracted 98,032 wstETH valued at $272 million and 3,000 cbBTC worth $221 million. The withdrawal was prompted by a vulnerability in the KelpDAO rsETH bridge, which prevented the extraction of ETH. Consequently, the whale exchanged 7,438 aEthWETH, valued at $16.83 million, for 1,930 stETH and 5,272 ETH, incurring a loss of 237 ETH, equivalent to $540,000. The address still holds 10,000 ETH in Aave, valued at $22.8 million.

data.title: Iran to Formalize Control Over Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Ebrahim Azizi, chairman of the Iranian Parliament's National Security and Foreign Policy Committee, announced that Iran will maintain control over the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, the Iranian parliament is set to introduce a bill to formalize this stance. Azizi stated that the legislation will address environmental, maritime, and national security concerns, with enforcement by the armed forces.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Sign Executive Order on Monday
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is set to sign an executive order on Monday at 3 p.m. Eastern Time (Tuesday at 2 a.m. UTC+8). According to BlockBeats, this development comes amid ongoing discussions in the market. Further details about the executive order have not been disclosed.

data.title: A whale withdrew 98,000 wstETH and 3,000 cbBTC from Aave.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, an OTC whale (0xd45...FB20) that previously purchased 163,000 ETH and 4,000 cbBTC withdrew 98,032 wstETH (worth $272 million) and 3,000 cbBTC (worth $221 million) from Aave. Due to the KelpDAO rsETH bridge vulnerability preventing further ETH withdrawals, the whale directly exchanged 7,438 aEthWETH (worth $16.83 million) for 1,930 stETH and 5,272 ETH, resulting in a loss of 237 ETH (worth $540,000). Currently, this address still holds 10,000 ETH (worth $22.8 million) on Aave.

data.title: Structural Shift in Crypto Venture Capital as AI Gains Traction
data.description:
The crypto venture capital sector is undergoing a significant structural transformation. According to ChainCatcher, investors are now demanding that startups demonstrate real users and revenue before committing funds, marking the end of an era where early-stage projects could easily secure financing. The reliability of token models as an exit strategy has significantly decreased, with low-circulation, high-valuation token issuances consistently underperforming in the market. As a result, investors are reverting to traditional equity approaches.

Simultaneously, the rise of the AI sector is attracting substantial limited partner (LP) funds and entrepreneurial talent, further complicating fundraising efforts for crypto venture capital. However, several investors have noted that reduced competition, more reasonable valuations, and an improved regulatory environment suggest that 2026-2027 could be the strongest investment years since 2018. Future investments are expected to focus on areas with clear business models, such as stablecoins, payments, tokenization, real-world assets, and financial infrastructure. The boundaries between crypto venture capital and traditional venture capital are also anticipated to blur more rapidly.

data.title: Hanwha Investment & Securities Joins Canton Network for Strategic Partnership
data.description: Hanwha Investment & Securities has become a member of the Canton Network, a blockchain infrastructure utilized by global financial institutions. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration aims to explore cooperation across various financial sectors and establish a strategic partnership focused on digital transformation in global finance.

data.title: SpaceX Reschedules GPSIII-8 Mission Launch Due to Weather Conditions
data.description: On April 19, SpaceX announced on social media that the GPSIII-8 mission launch has been rescheduled to April 21 due to unfavorable weather conditions affecting rocket recovery. According to Jin10, the team is closely monitoring the weather situation to ensure a successful launch.

data.title: Web3 Carnival 2026 Officially Opens
data.description: Foresight News posted on X (formerly Twitter) that the Web3 Carnival 2026 has officially commenced and is currently underway. Attendees are encouraged to visit booth J02 and connect with Chloeppan for networking opportunities. The event is a significant gathering for Web3 enthusiasts, featuring various activities and discussions related to the Web3 ecosystem.

data.title: Polymarket plans to raise $400 million at a valuation of $15 billion.
data.description: Polymarket has raised $400 million in funding, with Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) participating. Polymarket is in talks with investors to raise $400 million at a valuation of approximately $15 billion. This funding round follows a $600 million round in which ICE invested last month. (The Information)
